calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
Comm. Sue Kapln, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Arnold Evje II, Esq. for Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc, presented by Sean Hughes, the property manager.
Arnold C. Ellis, Esq. for Defendants: Wilma and Wilfredo Cortez, also present.
Parties reached a settlement by Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of the action With Prejudice. Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows: Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 520 S. Van Ness #139B, San Francisco.
Rental agreement is forfeited, back rent $926.00, writ issued with no stay.
Defendants to obtain in home support service and clean up to pass inspection by May 2004.
Rent for March and April in total of $926.00 to Plaintiff's agent on or before Apr. 15, 2004.
Inspections are scheduled for first Thurday of the month starting on May 2004, defendant's counsel to be present during the inspection. If necessary, SF. Inspector and Health Dept. can inspects the property with 3 day notice to defendant's counsel.
If defendant did not comply with the agreement, plaintiff may so state by ex parte declaration, with 48 hours notice and have judgment entered. Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture. No one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession.
Any items left in the premises will be disposed of.
Duration of the terms of the stipulation is from 4-1-04 through 3-31-05. If Defendat compled, Plaintiff to filed dismissal with prejudice.
Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees.
All parties agreed to the terms of the settlement in open court.
Matter is deemed settled and remove from the Trial Calendar.

The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
